role: Infrastructure layer for exposing ArchSpine's internal resources and tools to external AI agents via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) over stdio transport, with context-aware access control.
responsibility: Defines MCP server initialization and stdio transport, registers resource and tool handlers by delegating to SpineResources and SpineTools, provides context-gated access control via MCPContextGate for resource reads and tool execution, and exposes URI templates for project metadata, files, and index within the .spine directory.

children.role: Infrastructure facade class for gating Model Context Protocol (MCP) context flow based on priming state and operational mode.

Infrastructure facade providing MCP resource templates and handlers for accessing ArchSpine project metadata and files within the .spine directory, with context-aware access control via MCPContextGate.
Infrastructure facade implementing the Model Context Protocol (MCP) server to expose ArchSpine's internal resources and tools to external AI agents via stdio transport.
MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool facade that wraps core ArchSpine system components (Scanner, RuleEngine, Manifest, Config) into a unified interface for external AI agents.
